station_address: Plot No 2, next to Reliacne Mall, TPS 5, Khira Compound, Santacruz (West), Mumbai, Maharashtra 400054
text: At Bharat Petroleum Corporation Santacruz, beware of overcharging and pressure selling. Staff allegedly tried to sell low-quality coolant and engine oil at ₹330/litre and attempted to bill ₹1,650. Felt pressured and would not recommend.

station_address: Plot No 2, next to Reliacne Mall, TPS 5, Khira Compound, Santacruz (West), Mumbai, Maharashtra 400054
text:
I filled rs 1500 petrol. the person swiped rs 2000 in the card. when I realised through message. he simply denied the transaction. he said this transaction doesn't belongs to the petrol pump.
even though showing the transaction confirmation . he said money has not deducted. he was trying to swipe again the amount.
so be careful if you visit this pump. and give the card for swiping.

station_address: Plot No 2, next to Reliacne Mall, TPS 5, Khira Compound, Santacruz (West), Mumbai, Maharashtra 400054
text: Their service is not soo good when I went here for filling petrol there was a long queue and the reason for that was the guy who fills the petrol was busy in other work after filling petrol I went to fill air in tyre and there was also a long queue and the guy who was filling air was a corrupted guy he was asking money for filling air and the person who was ready to pay was getting filled aird without being in a queue so I will suggest everyone to insist of visiting here you should visit hp petrolium which is befor this petrol pump their service is better

station_address: Plot No 2, next to Reliacne Mall, TPS 5, Khira Compound, Santacruz (West), Mumbai, Maharashtra 400054
text:
Fraud petrol pump...They are cheating ppl when get chance...Not putting the petrol for the price you paid...The indicator doesnt turn up only even after filling 1000 rs petrol...Something wrong is going on here...Dont ever fill the fuel from here...
First check the petrol flowing ask.them.not to lock the pipe in the petrol tank...keep the petrol flow visible...
This petrol pump is a big fraud and chor...
Its an open daylight robbery when they pretend to fill the petrol but the tank hasnt received anything inside...
The indicator doesnt turn up & when asked about it they strt giving all fake excuses...
Big fraud petrol pump...
One should report this BP petrol pump to the media and  all others...
